Falcon reference source snapshot
================================

Source: https://falcon-sign.info/impl/
Files vendored from the official Falcon reference implementation pages.

Selected version:
- README.txt reports version: 2020-09-30

Vendored files:
- Makefile
- README.txt
- config.h
- falcon.h
- fpr.h
- inner.h
- codec.c
- common.c
- falcon.c
- fft.c
- fpr.c
- keygen.c
- rng.c
- shake.c
- sign.c
- vrfy.c

Notes:
- These files were extracted from the official HTML source browser and converted back to plain source text for local builds.
- License text is included in the vendored source headers and README.
